name: Non-Daemon Foreground Output Flags

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Non-Daemon Foreground Output Flags is complete and correct

scope: Non-daemon stdout flags: wolfcastle start --foreground should not use --interleaved by default. It should accept the same flags as wolfcastle log (--thoughts, --interleaved, --json, default summary) and use the same default renderer (summary). The foreground output path lives in internal/daemon/start.go or cmd/daemon/start.go. See Item 2 from 2026-03-23T03:00:43Z inbox.
